rounds.name: Round 1: First Spark
rounds.mission: Find one person who picked the same top value as you.
rounds.prompt: Ask: Is loyalty proven by words, time, or actions?

rounds.name: Round 2: Green Flag Check
rounds.mission: Talk to someone new and compare your green flags.
rounds.prompt: Ask: What is a green flag you notice quickly?

rounds.name: Round 3: Chemistry Challenge
rounds.mission: Build a low-pressure first date together in under three minutes.
rounds.prompt: Plan a $50 date night. Where are you going and why?

rounds.name: Round 4: Real Intentions
rounds.mission: Find out whether your dating pace and relationship goals match.
rounds.prompt: Ask: What makes you feel safe enough to keep dating someone?

rounds.name: Round 5: Final Spark
rounds.mission: Privately choose who you would like to talk to again.
rounds.prompt: Ask: What was your favorite conversation tonight?
